items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario outcome.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario behavior related to the 'Agent marketplace security review'. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific outcomes or results from this scenario simulation. The linked use cases and prior steps do not provide concrete evidence that the expected results of the scenario have been confirmed or that any actionable failure reports were generated, leading to an inconclusive status.
